name: Mike Thompson
notes:
[DIRECT] No livestock -- 'I don't do livestock. I'm not set up for that.'
[DIRECT] No oversized loads -- 'I don't have the permits for oversized freight.'
[DIRECT] Max 5 days preferred -- 'I don't want to be out more than five days if I can help it.'
[DIRECT] Will stretch to 7 days if rate justifies it.
[IMPLIED] Avoids West Coast -- 'I avoid the West Coast like the plague' (Colorado and beyond).
[IMPLIED] Prefers loads pointing toward Memphis -- emphasizes Southeast brings him toward home.
[IMPLIED] High deadhead sensitivity -- detailed story about a load ruined by 200 empty pickup miles.
